title: General Recreational Activities/Sports * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > General Recreational Activities/Sports * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions 5 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Blindness Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Native American Community Native American Community AIDS/HIV Issues Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF ARC UMATILLA COUNTY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides connections to resources such as case management services, assistance with advocacy, disability awareness training, education, recreational programs, and vocational training. 215 W Orchard Avenue Hermiston, OR 978381738 Eligibility: Individuals who have intellectual and developmental disabilities and their families Hours: Monday 9am-noon Email (541) 567-7615 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BEND PARK AND RECREATION DISTRICT RECREATION DISTRICT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides various recreation opportunities, such as sports, fitness, crafts, and music, senior centers, and swimming pools. Youth programs include topics such as art, science, technology, and nature. Provides preschool, after-school care, no-school-day child care, and Kids’ Corner, parent-child activity activities are available as well. Operates and maintains developed and undeveloped parkland, including natural areas, hiking trails, and the following facilities: Bend Senior Center, Juniper Swim and Fitness Center, Larkspur Community Center, The Pavilion, and The Art Station. Also operates a variety of sports complexes, including a skate park, ice skating and roller rink, and dog off-leash areas. 799 SW Columbia Street Bend, OR 97702 Eligibility: -Unrestricted. Activities and classes are available for all ages, with special programs for young children, youth, individuals with disabilities, and older adults. -After-school care/no school child care: K-5th grade -Youth enrichment programs: Ages 3-17 Hours: Varies by activity. Visit website for the event calendar. After-school care: End of school day-5:30pm; no school child care 7am-5:30pm on select days Email (541) 389-7275 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CITY OF PENDLETON CITY OF PENDLETON RECREATION CENTER CITY OF PENDELTON PARKS AND RECREATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides various recreation opportunities such as athletic programs (youth sports, adult sports, and special needs open gym), fitness opportunities, and community-based recreation at community centers and swimming pools. Also offers drop-in enrichment activities for teens, babysitting classes, and a parent and child toddler playtime two times per week. Operates and maintains parklands, including natural areas, community centers, and hiking trails. 510 SW Dorion Avenue Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Office: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Recreation sites: Hours vary Email (541) 966-0228 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PGA HOPE PACIFIC NORTHWEST PGA HOPE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a 6-8 week golf program taught by PGA professionals who are trained in adaptive golf and military cultural competency with a focus on veterans with physical and cognitive conditions, such as Traumatic Brain Injury (TBI), Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder (PTSD), and amputees. Also provides golf equipment to participants. 6989 Littlerock Road SW Tumwater, WA 98512 Eligibility: Veterans and active duty military members Hours: Varies by tournament dates Email (360) 456-6496 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PORTLAND PARKS AND RECREATION PORTLAND PARKS AND RECREATION ADAPTIVE AND INCLUSIVE RECREATION ADAPTIVE RECREATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers community-based recreation activities and leisure services specially designed for children, teens, and adults with disabilities and/or special needs. 1120 SW 5th Avenue Suite 858 Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Children, teens, and adults who have a disability and/or special needs Hours: Office hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm. Activity hours vary. Email (503) 823-2883 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PORTLAND PARKS AND RECREATION PORTLAND PARKS AND RECREATION ADAPTIVE AND INCLUSIVE RECREATION INCLUSION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides guidance and access with people living with disabilities can access Portland Parks and Recreation classes and activities. 1120 SW 5th Avenue Suite 858 Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Individuals who have a disability and/or special needs Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 307-4131 , , Get Directions Visit Website More Details ARC UMATILLA COUNTY ARC UMATILLA COUNTY BEND PARK AND RECREATION DISTRICT RECREATION DISTRICT CITY OF PENDLETON CITY OF PENDELTON PARKS AND RECREATION PORTLAND PARKS AND RECREATION ADAPTIVE RECREATION
